title: Solstice Essentials
description: Essential commands and features for Fabric servers
body:
![Solstice Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ce1948267ba118b0f201c2dfb68788a8532440.png)

**Essential features for Fabric servers!**

## Check out the documentation!

The documentation contains all features, commands and configuration: https://solstice.alexdevs.me/

## From player homes to chat customizations to...

Solstice evolves every version to include more functionality.

Check out the features in the [modules pages of the documentation](https://solstice.alexdevs.me/modules/)!

## Support

**Found a problem? Not sure how to do something?**

Open an issue on the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Ale32bit/Solstice/issues) or join the Discord server:

[![Join the Discord server](https://discord.com/api/guilds/387712125210198016/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/PYzP4XjzH4)
